name: dardock-whatsapp-router
description: Dardock workflow plugin for classifying WhatsApp messages into tasks, progress updates, blockers, reports, and operational replies.

interface.shortDescription: Route WhatsApp notes into ClickUp tasks and Notion reports.
interface.longDescription: Classifies Dardock WhatsApp messages into operational intents such as task, progress, blocker, query, or report, then prepares structured outputs for ClickUp, Notion, and response messages.
defaultPrompt: Clasifica este mensaje de WhatsApp y prepara la acción operativa.
Convierte esta nota de voz transcrita en tarea ClickUp y avance Notion.
Responde este WhatsApp con estado ejecutivo del cliente.
